name: Mixed Medley Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mori-Nu silken extra firm tofu -- drained and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
8 oz Pineapple chunks, canned -- drained with liquid reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. In sesame oil, sauté garlic and ginger until fragrant.
2. Add tofu and stir-fry until lightly browned. Remove tofu and set aside.
3. Add broccoli, snow peas, red pepper slices, yellow pepper slices, leek, mushrooms, pineapple chunks (without liquid), mandarin orange segments, soy sauce, tomato sauce, and cornstarch to the wok.
4. Stir-fry until vegetables are just crisp-tender.
5. Return tofu to the wok.
6. Combine reserved pineapple liquid with remaining ingredients in a bowl; stir until smooth.
7. Pour the mixture over the contents of the wok, stirring thoroughly to coat everything.
8. Serve hot over rice.
9. Makes 6 servings of 1 cup each.
